attacking_style: Opportunistic late attacker who exploits tactical confusion and distracted opponents. Strikes decisively when rivals are fixated on secondary objectives rather than the immediate stage win.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Demonstrated effectiveness on breakaway-friendly stages where tactical positioning matters more than pure power. Likely suited to semi-flat/transitional stages.
vulnerability: Unknown from available data. As ProContinental rider at time of observation, may struggle against fully committed WorldTour sprint trains.
key_patterns: Exploits tactical distractions when opponents focus on jersey competitions rather than stage win.
Shows tactical maturity beyond years, reading race dynamics to time decisive moves.
Capable of beating higher-tier riders when tactical situation favors awareness over raw power.
form_trajectory: unknown: only single 2018 observation available, no recent data to assess current trajectory
